comments.body: @QiWang19 FWIW this includes all recently-identified fixes to the `gpgme` wrappers; consider updating to it in CRI-O. (It does not include https://github.com/proglottis/gpgme/pull/47 , which is also relevant but AFAICT makes no difference). Note that the FD tracking problems in the underlying C library still need to be investigated.
